artifacts.name: unit-tests-ActionBar
artifacts.description: Unit tests for ActionBar save behavior including success and error notifications (T-FE-PERS-001-03, T-FE-PERS-001-04)

artifacts.name: integration-test-savePerformance
artifacts.description: Integration test verifying saveModel completes within 500ms for 1000 bricks (T-FE-PERS-001-02)

summary.work_completed: Implemented frontend tests for FR-PERS-001 (Save Model) covering serialization, performance, success notification, and error handling.
key_findings: All four test IDs for FR-PERS-001 are now covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01, 02, 03, 04.
Performance test ensures saveModel remains within 500ms budget for 1000 bricks.
Tests follow existing patterns and are ready for CI.

human_review_required.item: PR review for test quality and completeness
human_review_required.reason: Standard gate before implementation; ensure tests are comprehensive and pass on CI

recommended_actions: Review PR #58 changes for correctness and completeness.
Run `pnpm test` to verify all unit and integration tests pass.
Implement ActionBar and Notification components to satisfy the tests (if not already done).
Ensure persistenceService.saveModel behavior matches the tests (error handling, schema versioning).
After implementation, hand off to frontend-review-agent for code review.
next_agent_context.summary: Tests for FR-PERS-001 are complete and ready for implementation. Please implement the missing UI and service behaviors to make the tests pass.
